chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-3826 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.15636 of 2025 (Urgency) 2. For orders on office objection No.1 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.15637 of 2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case. 05.08.2025 Mr. Abdul Hafeez Sandhu, Advocate for the petitioner. --------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2. Disposed of having become infructuous. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner seeks post arrest bail in FIR No.71 of 2025 under Section 96(a), CNS Act, 2024 R/w 109 PPC registered at police station Khokhrapar, Karachi. Now the CNS Act has been amended by the Government and proviso for grant of bail is inserted and it is only pending required assent of the Governor, therefore, the petitioner has an alternate remedy to approach the learned trial Court/Special Tribunal/or competent Court as the case may be under the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances (Amendment) Act, 2025 for his appropriate relief. Under such circumstances, the instant petition is disposed of; however, the petitioner is at liberty to approach the learned trial court for his appropriate relief. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS
